name: Crate
description: Screenshot a music post, get the records in your Spotify crate.
_scope: Must stay wide enough to include index.html: an installed iOS app has its own storage container, so Crate always launches signed out and has to visit the sign-in page. If that navigation fell outside scope, iOS would bounce it to Safari and the session would be stored there instead of in the app — signed out again on every launch.
